body: Our composite order shipped this week, but the carton count is six boxes short of what we were billed for.
Thank you for flagging this. Could you send a photo of the packing slip so we can compare it to the invoice?
Gladly. The packing slip is attached; it lists 18 boxes but only 12 arrived at our Dearborn office.
After resetting our password the sign-in page simply loops back to itself and will not let us place an order.
We are looking into the session settings on our side; a stale browser cookie may be the culprit.
The download button for the May spend statement does nothing; might you send the PDF along?
The statement PDF is attached, and we have logged the download-button issue. Marking this solved.
Our front desk reports the reorder checkout will not complete at the payment step. Grateful for any help.
Saving any edit to the compressor service note throws an error and the change is lost.
Reproduced on our side and escalating to the portal team. We will keep you posted.
We set up a standing monthly order on Tuesday, yet Saved Orders still shows the template locked.
Thank you. The template was pending account verification; I have unlocked it for your office now.
We placed our quarterly bulk order but the loyalty credit never posted to our account.
Your loyalty credit has been applied and now shows on your account ledger. Thank you for your patience.
Might you send a billing receipt for our annual account fee? Our accountant needs it for the records.
Of course. The receipt is attached as a PDF. Please let us know if you need it in any other format.
The two crowns came back a shade lighter than the prescription called for; we need them remade.
Could you confirm the prescribed shade and the case number? We will prioritize the remake once we have it.
We would like to place one bulk reorder of exam kits and toothbrushes for our free screening day.
Happy to help. Please send the quantities you need and we will put together a single bulk order.
Our front desk says supply cart totals reset to zero after they log out and back in.
We have reproduced the cart reset and opened a portal ticket. A fix is planned for the next release.
Our service plan invoice shows the multi-chair price, but we only hold a single-chair plan. Please review.
You are correct; the plan was misclassified. We have issued a corrected invoice with the single-chair rate.
The two-factor verification code email never reaches our inbox or spam folder when we try to sign in.
We see the codes bouncing from your mail server. Could your IT contact allowlist our sending domain?
Our autoclave pouch reorder has read processing for several days and still has not shipped or updated.
The order was held on a credit-card verification step. I have cleared it; it should ship within two days.
Our invoice lists the practice as Bright Smile rather than Bright Smiles. Could that be corrected, please?
Apologies for the typo. I have updated your account name and reissued the invoice as Bright Smiles.
A community member asked through the contact form whether there are weekend watercolor class openings.
An admin can reset a team member's password from Account Users, select the user, then choose Send Reset Link.
